empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please provide us with your order details so that we can look into this matter further? We will do our best to resolve this issue promptly and ensure that you receive the correct product before your wife's birthday.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm extremely <SENTIMENT> with my recent order, <ORDER_ID>, where I was supposed to receive <PRODUCT>, but instead, I got a coffee maker. This is not only the wrong item, but it's also a birthday gift for my wife, and her birthday is in just two days, which is why I paid extra for express shipping. I've already tried contacting support once and was advised to check the packaging again, but I'<PRODUCT>'s no mistake - I really did receive a coffee maker. I'm reaching out again because I need this resolved today, and I hope we can find a solution to get the correct item to me as soon as possible.
